sprite

rewrite.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/node.hpp"
00007 
00008 namespace sprite
00009 {
00011   template<TagValue CtorOrOper> struct rewrite
00012   {
00013     rewrite() {}
00014     BOOST_STATIC_ASSERT(CtorOrOper==CTOR || CtorOrOper==OPER);
00015     #define F(z,n,_)                                             \
00016         void operator()(                                         \
00017             Node & node, size_t id                               \
00018             BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(n,NodePtr const & arg) \
00019           ) const                                                \
00020         {                                                        \
00021           node.destroy_payload();                                \
00022           new(node._payload()) payloads::InPlace<n>(             \
00023               BOOST_PP_ENUM_PARAMS(n,arg)                        \
00024             );                                                   \
00025           node.m_id = id;                                        \
00026           node.m_arity = n;                                      \
00027           node.m_tag = CtorOrOper;                               \
00028         }                                                        \
00029         
00030     BOOST_PP_REPEAT(SPRITE_INPLACE_BOUND,F,)
00031     #undef F
00032 
00033     #if 0
00034     // TODO
00035     void operator()(
00036         Node & node, size_t id, NodePtr const & arg0, NodePtr const & arg1
00037       ) const
00038     {
00039       node.destroy_payload();
00040       // new(node._payload()) payloads::ChildList(arg0,arg1);
00041       node.m_id = id;
00042       node.m_tag = CHOICE;
00043     }
00044     #endif
00045   };
00046 
00048   template<> struct rewrite<FAIL>
00049   {
00050     rewrite() {}
00051     void operator()(Node & node) const
00052     {
00053       node.destroy_payload();
00054       node.m_tag = FAIL;
00055     }
00056   };
00057 
00059   template<> struct rewrite<CHOICE>
00060   {
00061     rewrite() {}
00062     void operator()(
00063         Node & node, size_t id, NodePtr const & lhs, NodePtr const & rhs
00064       ) const
00065     {
00066       node.destroy_payload();
00067       new(node._payload()) payloads::Choice(lhs,rhs);
00068       node.m_id = id;
00069       node.m_tag = CHOICE;
00070     }
00071   };
00072 
00074   template<> struct rewrite<FWD>
00075   {
00076     rewrite() {}
00077     void operator()(Node & node, NodePtr const & dest) const
00078     {
00079       node.destroy_payload();
00080       new(node._payload()) payloads::Fwd(dest);
00081       node.m_tag = FWD;
00082     }
00083   };
00084 
00086   template<> struct rewrite<INT>
00087   {
00088     rewrite() {}
00089     void operator()(Node & node, meta::ValueType<INT>::type value) const
00090     {
00091       node.destroy_payload();
00092       new(node._payload()) payloads::Int(value);
00093       node.m_tag = INT;
00094     }
00095   };
00096 
00098   template<> struct rewrite<FLOAT>
00099   {
00100     rewrite() {}
00101     void operator()(Node & node, meta::ValueType<FLOAT>::type value) const
00102     {
00103       node.destroy_payload();
00104       new(node._payload()) payloads::Float(value);
00105       node.m_tag = FLOAT;
00106     }
00107   };
00108 
00109   // A minor convenience, perhaps.  These aliases prevent having to construct
00110   // an instance of rewrite<Tag> to perform a rewrite step when the Tag is
00111   // not a variable.
00112 
00114   rewrite<CTOR> const rewrite_ctor = rewrite<CTOR>();
00115 
00117   rewrite<OPER> const rewrite_oper = rewrite<OPER>();
00118 
00120   rewrite<FAIL> const rewrite_fail = rewrite<FAIL>();
00121 
00123   rewrite<CHOICE> const rewrite_choice = rewrite<CHOICE>();
00124 
00126   rewrite<FWD> const rewrite_fwd = rewrite<FWD>();
00127 
00129   rewrite<INT> const rewrite_int = rewrite<INT>();
00130 
00132   rewrite<FLOAT> const rewrite_float = rewrite<FLOAT>();
00133 }
